title: Paris in Spring
writer: Samuel Hoffenstein, Franz Schulz, Keene Thompson
actors: Mary Ellis, Tullio Carminati, Ida Lupino
plot: Afraid of marriage, Simone (Mary Ellis) breaks off her long term engagement with her fiancé Paul de Lille (Tullio Carminati). Paul heads to the top of The Eiffel Tower with thoughts of suicide. In another part of Paris and also af...
